jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Voylla
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Voylla in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!
